text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Teio Sho is the final G1 dirt race of the
spring season. However, Hokko Tarumae doesn't
enter. Perhaps she's weighed down by her
crushing defeat in Dubai.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey and Wonder Acute set out to
make an exciting race, in the hope it will cheer up
and inspire Hokko Tarumae.
